summary: Live-applied ADR 0337 on `codex/ws-0337-live-apply` by tightening the repo-relative path contract to reject repository escapes, normalizing legacy workstream shard metadata back to canonical in-repo worktree and doc paths, hardening worktree creation and service scaffolding against out-of-repo metadata, and recording branch-local verification from the latest realistic `origin/main` base while leaving protected generated surfaces for the final mainline integration step.

verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --check` and `python3 scripts/validate_public_entrypoints.py --check` both passed after the shard normalization, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-workstream-registry-check-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-validate-public-entrypoints-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Branch ownership and repository gate slices
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/workstream_surface_ownership.py --validate-branch --base-ref origin/main`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces` all passed on the branch-local tree, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-workstream-surfaces-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-agent-standards-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-workstream-surfaces-gate-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_scaffold_service.py tests/test_validate_public_entrypoints.py tests/test_workstream_surface_ownership.py -q` both passed, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-data-models-r1.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-targeted-tests-r1.txt`.

`uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, zero workstreams in progress, and a blocked release cut because three pre-existing `controller_dependency_gap` waiver blockers remain open through `2026-04-06`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-release-status-r1.json`.
`git diff --check` passed after the registry normalization, validator updates, and evidence capture, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-04-ws-0337-git-diff-check-r1.txt`.

notes: This is the branch-local live-apply receipt for a repo-only ADR, so it records the dedicated worktree verification without claiming an integrated repo version yet.
The protected `README.md`, `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml` surfaces remain untouched in this branch so the final shared-surface replay can happen from fresh `main` during integration.

Because ADR 0337 changes repository coordination metadata and tooling rather than live platform state, `Implemented In Platform Version` remains `not applicable (repo-only)` and the platform version stays `0.130.98`.
